name: Mohammad Raditia Pradana
about: I am a Researcher at the Department of Geography, Universitas Indonesia, under the Spatial Modelling & Analysis Research Cluster (SPARC). My research focuses on urban environments and spatial processes, with a particular interest in understanding cities through street-view imagery and geospatial data. Using GIS, spatial analytics, computer vision, and machine learning, I investigate urban form, streetscape characteristics, environmental quality, urban greenery, walkability, and socio-spatial inequalities. My goal is to develop data-driven approaches that contribute to more sustainable, inclusive, and evidence-based urban planning and development.
